name: Capitol Punishment Chili
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Extra lean chuck, chili grind
2 pounds Extra lean pork, chili grind
1 pound Extra lean chuck, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
1/2 cup Wesson oil or kidney suet
1 teaspoon Mole (powdered), also called mole poblano
1 teaspoon Coriander seed (from Chinese parsley, cilantro)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine paprika, oregano, MSG, chili powder, cumin, beef bouillon, beer, and 2 cups water. Let simmer.
2. In a separate skillet, brown meat in 1-1.5 pound batches using Wesson oil or suet. Drain and add to the simmering spices. Continue until all meat is cooked through.
3. Saute chopped onion and garlic in 1 tablespoon oil or suet. Add to the spice and meat mixture. Add water as needed. Simmer for 2 hours. Stir in mole, sugar, coriander seed, hot sauce, and tomato sauce. Simmer for an additional 45 minutes.
4. Dissolve masa harina flour in warm water to form a paste. Add to the chili. Season with salt to taste. Continue simmering for 30 minutes. For a hotter flavor, add more Louisiana Hot Sauce if desired.
5. Makes 1 pot.
